challenge.title: Korak 30
challenge.description:
Treba da dodelite svojim prilagođenim radio dugmićima veličinu i oblik.

I dalje ciljajući .contact-method-radio-btn, postavite width na 20px, height na 20px, border-radius na 50%, i border na 2px solid gray.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Parent Teacher Conference Form

Please fill out the form below to help schedule your parent-teacher conference.

Student Information
Parent/Guardian Information
Preferred Contact Method
Additional Notes

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: You should continue to target the .contact-method-radio-btn class.

tests.testString:
const style = new __helpers.CSSHelp(document).getStyle('.contact-method-radio-btn');
assert.oneOf(style?.border, ['2px solid gray', '2px solid grey']);
